response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in geospatial routing pipelines, despite having broad full-stack exposure; their GIS work is in DLang and Node.js, not the required systems for routing tiling, and there's no evidence of distributed systems, real-time traffic integration, or navigation data optimization at scale.
strengths: Extensive open-source GIS project experience with real-world deployment
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Strong background in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated C++ or Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines
Lacks evidence of distributed systems, fault tolerance, or low-latency routing tile generation
Geospatial work is in DLang/Node.js, not aligned with required C++/Linux navigation systems
